commit_message:
Px100mhz Px100mhz This is a working (but incomplete) set of changes to be able to build a bitstream using Vivado 2017.4.  On my Core i7 7700K running Ubuntu under VMWare it's able to do it in about 12 minutes or so.

Right now it drives Vivado in project mode, going through a few steps to build the project from .tcl and then runs the implementation phase to build the bitstream.   Long term it'll probably be better to switch to non project mode but that requires a lot more manual .tcl scripting

examples.commit_message:
Px100mhz Px100mhz This is a working (but incomplete) set of changes to be able to build a bitstream using Vivado 2017.4.  On my Core i7 7700K running Ubuntu under VMWare it's able to do it in about 12 minutes or so.

Right now it drives Vivado in project mode, going through a few steps to build the project from .tcl and then runs the implementation phase to build the bitstream.   Long term it'll probably be better to switch to non project mode but that requires a lot more manual .tcl scripting
examples.patch:
@@ -106,7 +106,7 @@ int main(int argc,char **argv)
 	  "  signal no_write_count : unsigned(7 downto 0) := x\"00\";\n"
 	  "  \n"
 	  "  type ram_t is array (0 to %d) of unsigned(7 downto 0);\n"
-	  "  signal ram : ram_t := (\n",
+	  "  shared variable ram : ram_t := (\n",
 	  name,bytes,name,name,bytes);
 
   for(i=0;i<bytes;i++)
@@ -119,18 +119,18 @@ int main(int argc,char **argv)
 	  "begin\n"
 	  "\n"
 	  "--process for read and write operation.\n"
-	  "  PROCESS(Clk,ram,address,write_count,no_write_count)\n"
+	  "  PROCESS(Clk,write_count,no_write_count)\n"
 	  "  BEGIN\n"
-	  "    data_o <= ram(address);\n"
 	  "    writes <= write_count;\n"
 	  "    no_writes <= no_write_count;\n"
 	  "    if(rising_edge(Clk)) then \n"
 	  "      if we /= '0' then\n"
 	  "        write_count <= write_count + 1;        \n"
-	  "        ram(address) <= data_i;\n"
+	  "        ram(address) := data_i;\n"
 	  "      else\n"
 	  "        no_write_count <= no_write_count + 1;        \n"
 	  "      end if;\n"
+	  "      data_o <= ram(address);\n"
 	  "    end if;\n"
 	  "  END PROCESS;\n"
 	  "\n"
